== Notes for [[Item:Q52480|Q52480]] ==

{geni:about_me} HE WAS THE SON OF HARISHCHANDRA. HE FOUNDED TOWN OF ROHTAS GARH IN ROHITA DISTRICT BIHAR AND ROHTAK, ORIGINALLY ROHITAKAUL, MEANING FROM KUL(FAMILY) OF ROHIT.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
6707A5D5795471EFBBFC9A22EF79916BEC7F

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
